_source.what: UUIDs recovered for tier-list items that bg3.wiki lacked, via a community spreadsheet linked from a Steam guide.
_source.note: The sheet itself is web-crawled from bg3.wiki PLUS a few UUIDs the author found in-game. Pulled CSV via the /export?format=csv&gid=<gid> endpoints.

resolved.name: Spacehunt Boots
resolved.validation: UUID is already in items.json as 'Spaceshunt Boots' (spelling variant)

resolved.name: Coldsnap
resolved.validation: UUID is already in items.json as 'Cold Snap' (spacing variant)

resolved.name: Voss's Silver Sword (Act 3)
resolved.validation: Same physical item as the base 'Voss's Silver Sword' (already mapped); '(Act 3)' is an acquisition-timing annotation, not a different item

resolved.name: Salty Scimitar (RRR)
resolved.validation: Community sheet only — NOT in items.json or bg3.wiki. Corroborated by its 3 sheet-mates all validating against items.json; well-formed; no UUID collision

still_unresolved.name: Box of Fireworks
still_unresolved.reason: not on bg3.wiki, items.json, or the community sheet

still_unresolved.name: Box of Oddfire Fireworks
still_unresolved.reason: community sheet marks it 'ToDo: Not on Wiki/Easycheat'

still_unresolved.note: Generic family placeholders (Ring, Shield, Hat, Amulet (non-magical), Resistance elixir) are not single items and correctly have no single UUID.
Remaining specific gaps would need extracted RootTemplate game data (Nexus 'All Item UUIDs' txt or a .pak extraction).
